title: Greg Whalley
compiled_truth: Greg Whalley is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-07), Greg Whalley sent 347 and received 2421 emails, totalling 2768 interactions. Top correspondents: [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (32), [John Sherriff](people/john-sherriff) (17), [Michelle Nelson](people/michelle-nelson) (15), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (14), [Mark Frevert](people/mark-frevert) (13). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, _sent_mail, contacts, deleted_items, inbox, personal.
